security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Installer for the DigStore CLI + host runtime.
bundle.longDescription: DigStore is the content-addressable WASM store format by DIG Network. This installer unpacks the digstore CLI and host runtime, adds digstore to PATH, and verifies the install.
